creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yuri, is this issue FreeBSD-specific or do you see it on other
platforms as well?

Can you please provide a minimum reproducer, ideally one preprocessed
source file following https://gcc.gnu.org/bugs/#detailed ?

(A full port is not really quite a minimal reproducer.)

Do you still see this with GCC 14 or GCC 15 (USE_GCC=14 and USE_GCC=15)?
